worthSeeing.title: Bay of Kotor:
worthSeeing.text: A drowned canyon mistaken for a fjord, with medieval walled towns inside.

worthSeeing.title: Durmitor Park:
worthSeeing.text: A UNESCO national park with a glacial Black Lake and skiing in winter.

worthSeeing.title: Tara River Canyon:
worthSeeing.text: The second deepest canyon in the world, a rafting and hiking destination.

planningQuestions.a: Bay of Kotor, Durmitor Park, Tara River Canyon.
